supportedClaims: General Scientist v0 can run a bounded two-program computational trial through existing Sovryn evidence gates.
Leakage-risk hypotheses from Batch 25 remain testable but require direct overlap or feature/target evidence.
weakenedClaims: Split-risk deltas should not be treated as leakage evidence by themselves.
Repo/test reproduction readiness is support evidence until applied to third-party public repositories.
rejectedClaims: No fake AGI, human-level scientist, guaranteed discovery, benchmark-win, legal, medical, or unsafe-domain claim is accepted.
negativeResults: No direct duplicate/group/file/feature leakage mechanism was confirmed in the bounded continuation.
The repo/test route remains partial until it is applied to a third-party public repository with full test collection.

toolDecisions.evidence: Prior Protocol Card work provides source/protocol split bindings.
toolDecisions.nextUseCondition: Use only when a concrete research program needs this evidence and limitations are public.
toolDecisions.mustNotUseCondition: Do not use to claim discovery, official benchmark reproduction, or tool usefulness without direct evidence.
